CustomObject.description:
his Custom Metadata defines the list of Product-level mandatory fields to exclude during the validation of Share Class fields in Share Class Creation projects.
In these projects, Product-level fields should not block the validation of Share Class-level data. For example, fields such as the Investment Objective are mandatory at the Product level but not relevant when creating a new Share Class.
By maintaining this list, we ensure that only the appropriate Share Class fields are enforced during validation, while Product-level mandatory fields are excluded from the process.
CustomObject.label: PMT - Exclude field SC Validation
